description: VITALGear is the one stop shop for those who prefer reliable and quality bags. Carry your stuff in style with this Yogear bag from VITALGear. With ample space for office accessories and books, the bag is best suited for college and general heavy duty use. Height: 45 cm Width: 28 cm Depth: 14 cm Made of 600D polyester One main compartment with zipper closure with elasticated separator A zippered pocket on the front with a mesh pocket inside for carrying CDs Two mesh side pockets Padded back with air transpiring system A flap with click lock system on the front to secure the main compartment further Two adjustable padded shoulder straps A haul loop for handling ease Adjustable chest belt Moulded e-vap back panel Hydration system compatible Wash care Clean with a damp cloth when necessary Do not bleach, tumble dry or wring
